title: Looking for Category Manager at Treebo Hotels

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Treebo Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Join the Treebo Hotels family as a Category Manager in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!
